<@707511200765968464> will wait for this update. Any expected timeline for this feature to be added

<@1054362417741709372> , yeah they use something called a "Gamma Ramp".

Basically, old GPU's and VM's can't do a Gamma Ramp properly, it's very VERY advanced VM detection technique, and I've only ever seen it done in an Open source VM detection library, never implemented in practice. Also, it's rarely implemented because some budget PC's and laptops can't do Gamma Ramps, but it's becoming very rare, since even Integrated Graphics and Really cheap GPU's can do Gamma Ramps these days.

This is going to Evadus+'s next feature, we are going to create our own GPU drivers to emulate gamma ramps.
